comments.text: Related references. Original paper that answers the question for several familieas of triangles: [Erdos, P., Graham, R. L., Montgomery, P., Rothschild, B. L., Spencer, J., & Straus, E. G. Euclidean Ramsey theorems 3, (1975)]. Survey: [Graham, Ronald L. "Euclidean ramsey theory." Handbook of discrete and computational geometry. Chapman and Hall/CRC, 2017. 281-297.] Recent progress: [Currier, Gabriel, Kenneth Moore, and Chi Hoi Yip. "Any two-coloring of the plane contains monochromatic 3-term arithmetic progressions." Combinatorica 44.6 (2024): 1367-1380.] Upper bounds: [Mundinger, K., Zimmer, M., Kiem, A., Spiegel, C., & Pokutta, S. (2025). Neural Discovery in Mathematics: Do Machines Dream of Colored Planes?. arXiv preprint arXiv:2501.18527.]
